videos.title: LLM Zoomcamp 1.1 — Introduction
videos.description:
What an LLM is, why it needs RAG, and what we'll build in this module: an FAQ assistant for the course.

Lesson notes: https://github.com/DataTalksClub/llm-zoomcamp/blob/main/01-agentic-rag/lessons/01-intro.md

LLM Zoomcamp is a free course on building real-world LLM applications: https://github.com/DataTalksClub/llm-zoomcamp

Module 1 (Agentic RAG), Part 1 — lesson 1 of 10.

videos.title: LLM Zoomcamp 1.2 — Environment
videos.description:
Setting up the project with Python and uv, installing dependencies, and configuring your OpenAI API key (plus OpenAI-compatible alternatives like Groq).

Lesson notes: https://github.com/DataTalksClub/llm-zoomcamp/blob/main/01-agentic-rag/lessons/02-environment.md

LLM Zoomcamp is a free course on building real-world LLM applications: https://github.com/DataTalksClub/llm-zoomcamp

Module 1 (Agentic RAG), Part 1 — lesson 2 of 10.

videos.title: LLM Zoomcamp 1.3 — What is RAG
videos.description:
Why LLMs need external context, and the retrieval-augmented generation architecture: search, build a prompt, generate an answer.

Lesson notes: https://github.com/DataTalksClub/llm-zoomcamp/blob/main/01-agentic-rag/lessons/03-rag.md

LLM Zoomcamp is a free course on building real-world LLM applications: https://github.com/DataTalksClub/llm-zoomcamp

Module 1 (Agentic RAG), Part 1 — lesson 3 of 10.

videos.title: LLM Zoomcamp 1.4 — The Course FAQ Dataset
videos.description:
Fetching and exploring the FAQ data we use as the knowledge base for our RAG pipeline.

Lesson notes: https://github.com/DataTalksClub/llm-zoomcamp/blob/main/01-agentic-rag/lessons/04-dataset.md

LLM Zoomcamp is a free course on building real-world LLM applications: https://github.com/DataTalksClub/llm-zoomcamp

Module 1 (Agentic RAG), Part 1 — lesson 4 of 10.

videos.title: LLM Zoomcamp 1.5 — Search
videos.description:
Building a keyword search engine over the FAQ with minsearch: text vs keyword fields, filtering, and boosting.

Lesson notes: https://github.com/DataTalksClub/llm-zoomcamp/blob/main/01-agentic-rag/lessons/05-search.md

LLM Zoomcamp is a free course on building real-world LLM applications: https://github.com/DataTalksClub/llm-zoomcamp

Module 1 (Agentic RAG), Part 1 — lesson 5 of 10.

videos.title: LLM Zoomcamp 1.6 — Building a Prompt
videos.description:
Combining the user's question with search results into a prompt: separating fixed instructions from the per-request template.

Lesson notes: https://github.com/DataTalksClub/llm-zoomcamp/blob/main/01-agentic-rag/lessons/06-building-prompt.md

LLM Zoomcamp is a free course on building real-world LLM applications: https://github.com/DataTalksClub/llm-zoomcamp

Module 1 (Agentic RAG), Part 1 — lesson 6 of 10.

videos.title: LLM Zoomcamp 1.7 — RAG Pipeline
videos.description:
Wiring search + prompt + LLM into a working RAG pipeline using the OpenAI Responses API, and tracking tokens and cost.

Lesson notes: https://github.com/DataTalksClub/llm-zoomcamp/blob/main/01-agentic-rag/lessons/07-llm.md

LLM Zoomcamp is a free course on building real-world LLM applications: https://github.com/DataTalksClub/llm-zoomcamp

Module 1 (Agentic RAG), Part 1 — lesson 7 of 10.

videos.title: LLM Zoomcamp 1.8 — RAG Helper
videos.description:
Refactoring the pipeline into reusable files: ingest.py for loading/indexing and a RAGBase class encapsulating search, prompt, and the LLM call.

Lesson notes: https://github.com/DataTalksClub/llm-zoomcamp/blob/main/01-agentic-rag/lessons/08-rag-helper.md

LLM Zoomcamp is a free course on building real-world LLM applications: https://github.com/DataTalksClub/llm-zoomcamp

Module 1 (Agentic RAG), Part 1 — lesson 8 of 10.

videos.title: LLM Zoomcamp 1.9 — Data Ingestion
videos.description:
Making search persistent by separating ingestion from querying with sqlitesearch (SQLite FTS5), as a drop-in replacement for minsearch.

Lesson notes: https://github.com/DataTalksClub/llm-zoomcamp/blob/main/01-agentic-rag/lessons/09-data-ingestion.md

LLM Zoomcamp is a free course on building real-world LLM applications: https://github.com/DataTalksClub/llm-zoomcamp

Module 1 (Agentic RAG), Part 1 — lesson 9 of 10.

videos.title: LLM Zoomcamp 1.10 — Wrap-up of Part 1
videos.description:
Recap of the RAG pipeline we built and where to go next: vector search, agents, and other backends.

Lesson notes: https://github.com/DataTalksClub/llm-zoomcamp/blob/main/01-agentic-rag/lessons/10-rag-next-steps.md

LLM Zoomcamp is a free course on building real-world LLM applications: https://github.com/DataTalksClub/llm-zoomcamp

Module 1 (Agentic RAG), Part 1 — lesson 10 of 10.
